candidate_track_template.output_contract: scripts/propose-platform-track-candidates.ps1 emits candidate_tracks JSON; no file edits, commits, issues, or track directories are created automatically.

platforms.name: Janeway

evidence_sources.summary: Janeway is the first non-OJS open-source journal platform candidate.

blockers: Official plugin and packaging evidence must be reviewed before implementation.
No Janeway support or publication claim is allowed from this registry entry alone.

candidate_track.title: Janeway plugin bridge package and smoke plan
candidate_track.trigger: Open only after Track 83 reconnaissance evidence is reviewed and a maintainer approves a packaging lane.
scope: Map plugin or sidecar bridge contract.
Add disposable Janeway smoke evidence only after test environment approval.
acceptance_gates: Claim boundary remains reconnaissance until smoke passes.
Human review approves opening the track.

platforms.name: ScholarOne Manuscripts

evidence_sources.summary: ScholarOne is named in the proprietary platform matrix.

blockers: No documented Sourceright test tenant exists.
Vendor certification or support claims require direct evidence.

candidate_track.title: ScholarOne access and adapter feasibility reconnaissance
candidate_track.trigger: Open only when official access documentation or a test-environment path is available for review.
scope: Classify read-only, fixture-backed, and live-test possibilities.
Identify procurement or tenant blockers without implying support.
acceptance_gates: Human review approves opening the track.

platforms.name: Editorial Manager

evidence_sources.summary: Editorial Manager is named in the proprietary platform matrix.

blockers: No live integration access has been recorded.
Any adapter claim needs vendor-specific evidence.

candidate_track.title: Editorial Manager adapter feasibility reconnaissance
candidate_track.trigger: Open only after official documentation or a controlled test path is reviewed.
scope: Separate fixture-backed feasibility from live integration.
acceptance_gates: No support claim before fixture or live-smoke evidence.
Human review approves opening the track.

platforms.name: eJournalPress

evidence_sources.summary: eJournalPress is named in the proprietary platform matrix.

blockers: No public Sourceright-compatible integration contract has been verified.
A candidate track must start with official source review.

candidate_track.title: eJournalPress integration feasibility reconnaissance
candidate_track.trigger: Open only after official integration evidence is captured.
scope: Identify public integration or import/export surfaces.
Define fixture evidence before any implementation claim.
acceptance_gates: Human review approves opening the track.

platforms.name: Manuscript Manager

evidence_sources.summary: Manuscript Manager is named in the proprietary platform matrix.

blockers: No live tenant or official Sourceright adapter path has been recorded.

candidate_track.title: Manuscript Manager integration feasibility reconnaissance
candidate_track.trigger: Open only after official source review and maintainer approval.
acceptance_gates: Human review approves opening the track.
